questionHtml: Deduce the value of g and its absolute uncertainty for this experiment.
markschemeHtml:
g = 9.996 «m s−2» OR Δg = 4.20 «m s−2» ✔

g = (10 ± 4) «m s−2»

OR

g = (10.0 ± 4.2) «m s−2» ✔

Award [1] max for not proper significant digits or decimals use, such as: 9.996±4.178 or 10±4.2 or 10.0±4 or 10.0±4.18« m s−2 » .

meta.title: Deduce the value of g and its absolute uncertainty for this experiment.
